generations.label: 5th Gen (DT)
generations.common_competitors: Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500, Toyota Tundra

known_issues.title: Exhaust manifold bolt failure (5.7L Hemi)
known_issues.description: The factory exhaust manifold bolts on the 5.7L Hemi are prone to loosening or snapping due to heat cycling, allowing the manifold to separate from the head.
known_issues.symptoms: A loud ticking or tapping noise from the engine that gets louder under acceleration and is most noticeable on cold start, sometimes accompanied by a faint exhaust smell.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen closely for a ticking noise on cold start; ask if upgraded manifold studs/bolts have already been installed.

known_issues.title: Electronic shifter (eTorque/8HP) mis-shift and 8-speed shudder
known_issues.description: The ZF-sourced 8-speed automatic can develop a shudder or hesitation during light-throttle acceleration and low-speed shifts, particularly on trucks with the eTorque mild-hybrid system.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or vibration felt through the floor between 30-70 km/h under light acceleration, or a delayed/harsh 1-2 shift.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at steady light throttle on flat road and feel for shudder; check transmission fluid service history.

known_issues.title: TIPM (Totally Integrated Power Module) failure
known_issues.description: The TIPM, which controls fuel pump relay, starter relay, and various electrical circuits, can fail intermittently or completely, especially on higher-mileage trucks.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, fuel pump not priming, random dash warning lights, headlights or wipers not working correctly, or the truck stalling while driving.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for stored electrical fault codes with an OBD-II scanner and ask about any history of no-start complaints.

known_issues.title: Air suspension leaks (air-ride equipped trucks)
known_issues.description: Optional four-corner air suspension compressors and air springs can develop leaks over time, especially in cold climates.
known_issues.symptoms: The truck sitting noticeably lower on one corner overnight, an air compressor that runs excessively or continuously, or a suspension fault warning on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Park the truck overnight and check ride height in the morning before deciding to buy.

generations.label: 4th Gen (DS/DJ)
generations.common_competitors: Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500, Toyota Tundra

known_issues.title: Frame rust
known_issues.description: Trucks sold or driven in road-salt regions are prone to surface and structural rust on the frame rails and rear crossmember, a widely documented issue for this generation.
known_issues.symptoms: Visible flaking or bubbling rust on the frame rails, rear crossmember, or trailer hitch mounting area, sometimes with rust perforation.
known_issues.recommendation: Inspect the full frame from underneath, including the rear crossmember, and check for any prior frame rust recall or warranty repair.

known_issues.title: Exhaust manifold bolt failure (5.7L Hemi)
known_issues.description: Same factory exhaust manifold bolt design as later generations; bolts loosen or snap from heat cycling.
known_issues.symptoms: A ticking or tapping noise from the engine bay, louder under acceleration and most noticeable on cold start.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for ticking on cold start and ask about prior manifold bolt repairs.

known_issues.title: TIPM electrical failures
known_issues.description: The Totally Integrated Power Module is a documented weak point across this generation, causing a range of intermittent electrical faults.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, fuel pump failing to prime, random warning lights, or accessories (wipers, lights) behaving erratically.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored codes and ask the seller about any electrical gremlins or no-start events.

known_issues.title: Front suspension ball joint and tie rod wear
known_issues.description: Front-end suspension components wear faster than average, especially on trucks used for towing or on rough roads.
known_issues.symptoms: A clunking noise from the front suspension over bumps, uneven or accelerated front tire wear, and looseness in steering feel.
known_issues.recommendation: Have the front end inspected on a lift and check for play in ball joints and tie rod ends.

generations.label: LD (7th Gen)
generations.common_competitors: Chevrolet Impala, Ford Taurus, Toyota Avalon

known_issues.title: 8-speed automatic (ZF) shudder
known_issues.description: The ZF-sourced 8HP45/8HP70 automatic transmission is prone to a torque converter shudder that worsens as fluid ages, a widely reported issue across Chrysler/Dodge/Jeep products using this transmission.
known_issues.symptoms: A vibration or shudder felt through the pedal and console during light-throttle acceleration, typically between 30-70 km/h, and sometimes a delayed engagement into gear from Park.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at light, steady throttle and feel for shudder; ask for transmission fluid service records.

known_issues.title: Uconnect infotainment freezing/reboot loops
known_issues.description: The Uconnect touchscreen system can freeze, go black, or enter reboot loops, sometimes tied to a known software bug requiring a dealer reflash.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen freezing, going black, or repeatedly rebooting, occasionally disabling the backup camera and climate controls that are integrated into the screen.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle through all touchscreen functions including climate and backup camera during the test drive.

known_issues.title: TIPM electrical faults
known_issues.description: The Totally Integrated Power Module can develop intermittent faults affecting the fuel pump relay, starter, and other circuits.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, random warning lights on the dash, or accessories such as power windows and wipers behaving erratically.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored fault codes and ask about any history of no-start or electrical issues.

known_issues.title: Exhaust manifold ticking (5.7L/6.4L Hemi)
known_issues.description: V8 Hemi engines can develop exhaust manifold bolt loosening, causing an exhaust leak at the manifold-to-head joint.
known_issues.symptoms: A ticking or tapping noise from the engine bay that is louder on cold start and under acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for ticking on cold start, especially before the engine reaches operating temperature.

generations.label: LX (6th Gen)
generations.common_competitors: Chevrolet Impala, Ford Taurus, Nissan Maxima

known_issues.title: 8-speed automatic (ZF) shudder
known_issues.description: Early adoption of the ZF 8-speed automatic (2012+) brought torque converter shudder issues similar to later model years.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder felt through the pedal during light acceleration between 30-70 km/h, and occasional harsh or delayed shifts.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at light throttle on a smooth road and feel for shudder; ask about transmission fluid changes.

known_issues.title: TIPM electrical faults
known_issues.description: The Totally Integrated Power Module is a well-documented failure point on this generation, affecting fuel pump priming and other relays.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, fuel pump not engaging, or random accessory failures such as wipers or power locks not working.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored electrical codes and ask about any history of no-start complaints.

known_issues.title: Water pump failure (3.6L Pentastar)
known_issues.description: Early 3.6L Pentastar V6 engines had a documented water pump design weakness leading to premature failure.
known_issues.symptoms: Coolant leaking from the front of the engine, an overheating warning light, or a whining noise from the water pump area.
known_issues.recommendation: Check coolant level and look for leaks or residue near the water pump; ask about replacement history.

known_issues.title: Uconnect touchscreen failures
known_issues.description: Early Uconnect touchscreen units can fail or become unresponsive over time.
known_issues.symptoms: A blank or unresponsive touchscreen, loss of radio and backup camera display, or the unit failing to boot.
known_issues.recommendation: Test all touchscreen functions including navigation and backup camera before purchase.

known_issues.title: 8-speed automatic (ZF) shudder
known_issues.description: The ZF 8-speed automatic used in V6 and V8 automatic models is prone to torque converter shudder as fluid ages, consistent with the same transmission's issues in Charger and Ram products.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder felt through the pedal during light throttle acceleration, most noticeable between 30-70 km/h, sometimes with a delayed engagement from a stop.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at light steady throttle and feel for shudder; ask for transmission fluid service history.

known_issues.title: Rear axle/differential whine on Hellcat/Scat Pack
known_issues.description: High-power variants can develop a whining or humming noise from the rear differential, especially on cars used for hard launches or track days.
known_issues.symptoms: A whining or howling noise from the rear axle that changes with vehicle speed, sometimes worse during deceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for whining noise during test drive at varying speeds and ask about track use or launch control history.

known_issues.title: Uconnect infotainment freezing
known_issues.description: The touchscreen system can freeze or reboot randomly, a known issue across this Chrysler/Dodge platform generation.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen freezing, going black, or rebooting on its own, occasionally affecting the backup camera and climate display.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle through touchscreen menus, backup camera, and climate controls to confirm normal operation.

known_issues.title: Exhaust manifold ticking (V8 Hemi models)
known_issues.description: V8 Hemi-equipped cars can develop exhaust manifold bolt loosening, resulting in a ticking noise.
known_issues.symptoms: A ticking or tapping noise from the engine bay, more pronounced on cold start and under acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen carefully for ticking noise during cold start before the engine warms up.

generations.label: 3rd Gen
generations.common_competitors: Ford Explorer, Chevrolet Traverse, Toyota Highlander

known_issues.title: 8-speed automatic (ZF) shudder
known_issues.description: Shares the ZF 8-speed automatic with other Chrysler/Dodge products, and is similarly prone to torque converter shudder as the fluid ages.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or vibration felt through the floor during light acceleration, most noticeable between 30-70 km/h.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at steady light throttle and feel for shudder; ask about transmission fluid service history.

known_issues.title: TIPM electrical faults
known_issues.description: The Totally Integrated Power Module can fail intermittently, a common issue across this Chrysler/Dodge platform.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, random warning lights, or accessories such as power windows and wipers malfunctioning.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored fault codes and ask about any electrical or no-start complaints.

known_issues.title: Rear liftgate/third row electrical issues
known_issues.description: Power liftgate and third-row seat electronics can develop wiring or module faults over time.
known_issues.symptoms: The power liftgate failing to open or close fully, or third-row power fold/recline features not responding.
known_issues.recommendation: Test the power liftgate and all third-row seat functions during inspection.

known_issues.title: Exhaust manifold ticking (5.7L Hemi)
known_issues.description: V8 Hemi models can develop the same exhaust manifold bolt loosening seen across the Hemi engine family.
known_issues.symptoms: A ticking noise from the engine bay, louder on cold start and under acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for ticking noise on cold start before the engine reaches operating temperature.

generations.label: 5th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Toyota Sienna, Honda Odyssey, Kia Sedona

known_issues.title: Stow 'n Go seat track wear and rust
known_issues.description: The folding Stow 'n Go second and third row seat mechanisms and floor tracks are prone to rust and binding, especially in road-salt regions.
known_issues.symptoms: Seats that are difficult to fold or deploy into the floor wells, a grinding or squeaking noise when operating Stow 'n Go, or visible rust around the seat track latches.
known_issues.recommendation: Operate all Stow 'n Go seats through a full fold-and-deploy cycle to confirm they move smoothly.

known_issues.title: Power sliding door and liftgate failures
known_issues.description: Power sliding door and liftgate cables, motors, and latch modules wear out and can fail to open or close properly.
known_issues.symptoms: A sliding door or liftgate that opens/closes slowly, gets stuck partway, or fails to latch, sometimes with an error chime or warning light.
known_issues.recommendation: Test both power sliding doors and the liftgate through several full open/close cycles.

known_issues.title: TIPM electrical faults
known_issues.description: The Totally Integrated Power Module can fail intermittently, affecting the fuel pump relay and other circuits, similar to other Chrysler/Dodge products of this era.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent no-start, fuel pump not priming, or random dash warning lights and accessory failures.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored fault codes and ask about any no-start history.

known_issues.title: Automatic transmission wear
known_issues.description: The 6-speed automatic (62TE) can develop harsh or slipping shifts as it ages, particularly if fluid was never serviced.
known_issues.symptoms: Harsh or delayed shifts, slipping under acceleration, or a flare in RPM between gear changes.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through all gears, accelerating firmly, and feel for harsh or slipping shifts; ask for transmission fluid service history.
